visual_summary: An animated text component with left-to-right sliding animation by character. It is used to animate text within its component.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready other component with the following characteristics:

Name: Text Animate Demo 6
Description: An animated text component with left-to-right sliding animation by character. It is used to animate text within its component.
Style: minimal
Interactions: animated
Tags: text, animation

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
import { TextAnimate } from "@/registry/magicui/text-animate"

export default function TextAnimateDemo6() {
  return (
    <TextAnimate animation="slideLeft" by="character">
      Slide left by character
    </TextAnimate>
  )
}
